summary: Ukrainian forces used an optical fiber FPV drone to destroy a Polish 155-mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in the Kharkiv region. Russian soldiers were hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree. Ukrainian drone operators, including a former esports player now serving as an SVO UAV operator, have been critical in repelling enemy assaults and destroying tanks. Ukraine is deploying experts to the Middle East to train Gulf countries in countering drones, particularly Iranian systems. Interceptor drones have become a key element of Ukraine's short-range air defense, countering Russian "Geran" drones. Russian forces reported destroying 88 Ukrainian targets in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction on March 7, 2026.
